name: LightPath Technologies, Inc.
description: LightPath Technologies, Inc. is a leading global manufacturer of proprietary optical and infrared components and high-performance thermal imaging assemblies. With over 40 years of experience, the company specializes in designing and fabricating precision molded optics, infrared lenses, and integrated camera systems for demanding industries including aerospace, defense, industrial, and oil and gas. By leveraging vertically integrated manufacturing—from proprietary BlackDiamond™ chalcogenide glass to advanced EdgeIR™ AI-integrated cameras—LightPath provides customized, high-reliability solutions that enhance performance and precision for mission-critical applications across the globe.
